task_objective: Fix pytest packaging failure when dist/index.js is missing during validation.
tests_added: Added a package-script regression test that verifies missing runtime bundle files trigger the frontend build helper.
design_decisions: Kept static plugin metadata validation fail-fast.
Allowed only runtime bundle files to be regenerated through the existing pnpm run build command.
Fixed the validation race where pytest could package while Rollup had temporarily cleared dist/index.js.
results: Targeted package tests, Ruff, ty, TypeScript typecheck, Rollup build, and the full pytest suite passed.
